{{Quote|I helped his mercenary, Cydon Prax, find it.|Bera Kazan, on finding the Force Harvester|<ref name="Clone Wars" />}}
'''Bera Kazan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ''[[Sarpazian Rose]]'', a [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] marked with scratches and scorch marks from her various escapades. During the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Kazan became a hired [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Approximately one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle of the war]], Kazan and the [[Chistori]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] [[Cydon Prax]] discovered the [[Force Harvester]] device on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]]. Shortly afterward, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] betrayed and imprisoned Kazan, intending to use her in an experiment that would test the lethal effects of the Force Harvester.

Thus, Kazan was forced to join another [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]—the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]—in order to survive on the Separatist-occupied [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Working together, Kazan and Skywalker [[Battle on Alaris|defended]] a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] village against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], with the battle ultimately won after the arrival of [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|reinforcements]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I hate to imagine what effect Dooku's Force Harvester is gonna have on you.|Bera Kazan, to Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="Clone Wars" />}}
Prior to the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in late [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Bera Kazan engaged in illegal activities for [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. In addition to [[Gender/Legends|her]] occupation as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], Kazan worked as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], which she found to be hazardous, given the damage sustained to her personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]]—the ''[[Sarpazian Rose]]''—after numerous close encounters with [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="Clone Wars" />

[[File:Force_Harvester.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Force Harvester, an ancient power source excavated by Kazan and Prax]]
Bera Kazan joined the war on the side of the Separatists when [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] hired her tracking services in order to locate the [[Force Harvester]], an [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|ancient]] power source that could be used to [[Force drain/Legends|drain]] the [[The Force/Legends|life energies]] of all proximate living beings. Paired with a fellow mercenary named [[Cydon Prax]], the two discovered the Harvester on the junk [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]]. In the [[Standard month/Legends|month]] that followed the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of the Clone Wars, the Separatists excavated the device, although their activities raised the suspicions of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. A [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic task force]], led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], was deployed to Raxus Prime, where they engaged the Separatists in [[Conquest of Raxus Prime|battle]]. Skywalker pursued the fleeing Count, but was soon captured and transported to [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located in the [[Alaris Expanse]] of the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]].<ref name="Clone Wars" />

At the same time, Bera Kazan had been betrayed and imprisoned along with Skywalker and a group of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. After she informed Skywalker about the existence of the Force Harvester and Dooku's intention to test its power on them both, Kazan formed an alliance with the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] in order to survive the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] machinations. Moments after Cydon Prax activated the Harvester, Skywalker used his [[Telekinesis/Legends|powers]] to break open the cage he shared with Kazan. At Kazan's insistence, he also freed the Wookiees from their cages. The two then stole a pair of [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]] and escaped the proximity of the life-draining energy wave that emanated from the Harvester. Along the way, they quickly warned a group of Wookiees to vacate their village in order to avoid the deadly effects of the Harvester.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

Having earned the gratitude of the local Wookiee population on Alaris Prime, Bera Kazan arranged for two [[Maru/Legends|maru]] beasts to serve as transport for her and Skywalker. Using stealth, they discreetly infiltrated a Separatist outpost where they stole an [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]], which they used to infiltrate the enemy's base. After destroying several other [[Tank/Legends|tanks]] and dozens of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], Skywalker used the Separatists' communications tower and contacted the Republic for military assistance. Afterward, Kazan and Skywalker withdrew to a Wookiee village where they prepared for a Separatist attack and the arrival of Republic reinforcements.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

When the Confederacy launched a ruthless assault on the village, Bera Kazan and Anakin Skywalker assisted a group of Wookiee [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]] in the defense of their homes. They repelled several waves of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] attacks, preventing the Separatists from overwhelming their position, until a Republic [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] landed nearby and offloaded a contingent of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and several [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 Saber-class fighter tanks]] led by [[General/Legends|General]] Kenobi. Taking control of one of the tanks, Skywalker and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] engaged the remaining enemy units while Kazan remained behind to secure the village with the Wookiees and [[Cloning/Legends|clones]]. The destruction of the [[Harbinger (landing ship)|''Harbinger'']], destroyed by Kenobi and Skywalker, signaled the Republic's victory as the remaining Separatists fully withdrew from Alaris Prime.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

Bera Kazan's assistance to Anakin Skywalker enabled the young Jedi to report his findings to the Jedi Council regarding the Force Harvester and its greater purpose as the power source of the [[Dark Reaper]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. The information proved critical in the Jedi's efforts to destroy Count Dooku's new weapon of mass destruction, leading to a [[Battle of Thule|preemptive strike]] on the planet [[Thule/Legends|Thule]]. As the Republic invasion culminated with a direct assault on the ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kesiak]], Skywalker confronted and destroyed the Dark Reaper, ending the [[Dark Reaper crisis|crisis]] that began with the superweapon's reconstruction.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Hey!, a girl's gotta make living. Besides I had no idea one of the fringe benefits would be getting thrown in here and fed to the blasted thing.|Bera Kazan, outraged at being betrayed and used in a test of the Force Harvester's powers|<ref name="Clone Wars" />}}
[[File:Wookiee_warrior_dance.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Bera Kazan's compassion for the Wookiees influenced her decision to aid them against the Confederacy.]]
Bera Kazan was a young female [[Human/Legends|Human]] at the time of the Clone Wars. Despite her age, she proved to be a highly skilled mercenary with an array of talents, both as a smuggler and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. As an outlaw, she initially had no reservations about her employment with the Confederacy and willingly aided an unlawful rebellion against the Galactic Republic. She was not committed to the Separatist cause, however. Her only inclination in serving Count Dooku was a desire for wealth.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

Upon discovering that her usefulness to Dooku ended with the rediscovery of the Force Harvester, Kazan was bitter and resentful over the Count's betrayal despite the fact that she had honored her contract with the Separatists. She was further incensed by the knowledge that her former employer intended to analyze the Harvester's power by using Kazan as a living test subject. As such, she was completely willing to switch her allegiance to the Republic and their [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi protectors]].<ref name="Clone Wars" />

Despite her criminal career, Kazan harbored a strong sense of compassion for life. During the activation of the Force Harvester, she refused to allow a group of Wookiees to die like animals in cages, beseeching Anakin Skywalker to free them. While traveling through the forest of Alaris Prime, she further displayed more concern for the Wookiees by asking Skywalker to activate a village's alarm system so that the inhabitants could flee the impending wave of the Harvester.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

As a pilot, Kazan was skilled in the use of a variety of vehicles, including tanks, STAPs and starships. She was also a capable beast rider, as she demonstrated during her use of the maru as a transport.<ref name="Clone Wars" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bera appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] and was voiced by [[Grey Griffin|Grey DeLisle]], who also portrayed [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] in the same game.
